## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Nick Tippmann (TipTop) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss business updates and potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) is experiencing rapid growth, nearing 2M ARR and 12 full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Nick's fund is seeing strong deal flow and refining its vertical AI investment thesis](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Both are observing significant opportunities in AI-native services and vertical SaaS+AI solutions](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Marcel is considering raising funds to capitalize on their product-market fit and scale faster](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Growth and Challenges

  - [Nearly at 2M ARR, close to 12 full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Hired a CTO (Daniel) with experience from IFTTT and Canopy](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Experiencing rapid growth: 3x revenue in 3 months (40k to 160k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Facing "good" scaling challenges (hiring, systems breaking)](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

### TipTop's Fund Progress

  - [Increased deal flow in Q3, refining investment thesis](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Focus on vertical AI, legacy industry disruption, and AI-native systems](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Engaging with LPs, attending industry events (e.g., Primary Ventures, Coolwater Capital)](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Preparing LP updates and metrics analysis](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### AI-Native Services Opportunity

  - [Trend towards AI-augmented services replacing traditional consulting](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Examples: Prepare911 (drive-through automation), Alpaca Health (autism clinic back-office)](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Potential to capture 80% of system-of-record ACV with AI-native solutions](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Easier adoption as services vs. traditional software integration](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Vertical SaaS+ and AI Thesis

  - [TAM expansion: Software (1% GMV) → Software+FinTech (2-5%) → Vertical AI (additional 3-10%)](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Example: Even Up in personal injury law, capturing 80% of system-of-record ACV](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Opportunity to double ACV in established vertical SaaS markets with AI solutions](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Scaling

  - [72% gross margins, profitable](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Offering high-leverage consulting + AI workflows + offshore talent](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Expanding from content to other functions (e.g., recruiting)](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Building adaptable AI agent for complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - Potential to scale to $1B+ revenue with \<1000 employees

## Next Steps

  - [Nick to send Marcel details on potential LP arrangement and referral credit system](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [Marcel to review LP offer and consider raising funds to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Explore further collaboration opportunities between TipTop and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Continue discussions on AI-native services and vertical SaaS+ investment opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/9vKSNtD2VGdhSsc17zNByirud-LeEPBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
